description: Child credential is fully valid on its own (narrows parent [read, write] to [read], current window, not revoked). The parent's revocation_check resolves to REVOKED at verification time. Revoking the parent invalidates the subtree. This is a CHECK-TIME cascade: the rejection happens when the chain is verified against current revocation state, not on a later lookup. Matches tests/conformance/golden-fixtures/NEG-STALE-REVOCATION.json semantics (a verifier that ignores revocation state would wrongly accept).
expected_reason: parent delegation revoked; revocation of an ancestor cascades to the subtree at verification time (check-time, not next-lookup)
